channel.title: Science - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Brain Scans Reveal a Surprise About Neanderthal Intelligence - ScienceAlert
item.description:
1. Brain Scans Reveal a Surprise About Neanderthal Intelligence  ScienceAlert
  2. Neanderthal brains measure up to ours—literally  Ars Technica
  3. Neanderthals' brains weren't to blame for their demise, new study suggests  Live Science
  4. Neanderthals Were Likely Just As Smart As Us, So Their Extinction Probably Had Nothing To Do With Intelligence  IFLScience
  5. Scientists think they finally know why Neanderthals vanished  ScienceDaily

item.description:
1. In 2024, an Australian farmer clearing scrub followed a strange metallic glint to a prehistoric world hid  The Times of India
  2. Scientists find perfect fossils in rust beneath Australian farmland  ScienceDaily
  3. Scientists Found Perfect Fossils With Every Hair Intact Buried Under a Farm. Inside Them, a Rainforest That Shouldn't Exist  Indian Defence Review
  4. Scientists Unearth Impossible Fossils Trapped In Rust Beneath Australian Farmland  Indian Defence Review

item.title: One Experiment Failed for 32 Straight Years, Until Scientists Finally Grew This Mineral and Solved a 200-Year-Old Mystery - Indian Defence Review
item.description:
1. One Experiment Failed for 32 Straight Years, Until Scientists Finally Grew This Mineral and Solved a 200-Year-Old Mystery  Indian Defence Review
  2. After 200 years scientists finally crack the “dolomite problem”  ScienceDaily
  3. Scientists Just Solved a 200-Year-Old Mineral Mystery  AOL.com
